digest.top_line: AREST: adjuvant RT improved 3-yr LRFS 89.2% vs 80.9% (HR 0.52, p=0.02) in pT1-2N0 intermediate-risk OSCC — no OS signal at 47mo.
digest.tldr: Head-neck dominated today with AREST, the first RCT to address adjuvant RT in intermediate-risk N0 OSCC post-surgery. LRFS benefit is real; OS follow-up too short to read, especially in early-stage disease where events accrue slowly.

sites.intro: Adjuvant management of intermediate-risk N0 OSCC has had no RCT evidence since RTOG 9501/EORTC 22931 defined the high-risk (ENE/margin-positive) standard; AREST fills that gap.

studies.name: AREST
studies.tldr: 3-yr LRFS 89.2% vs 80.9% (HR 0.52, p=0.02) favoring adjuvant RT in pT1-2N0 intermediate-risk OSCC; no OS benefit at 47.2mo.
details: 🔍 multicenter phase III RCT, India, N=392 (191 RT vs 201 observation), median f/u 47.2mo
🔍 population: pT1-2N0 OSCC post-curative surgery with intermediate-risk features
⚠️ no DFS or OS benefit at median 47.2mo follow-up
📊 exploratory: LRFS benefit signal stronger in oral tongue subgroup
🔗 RTOG 9501/EORTC 22931 established adjuvant CRT for high-risk H&N (positive margins, ENE); AREST addresses the intermediate-risk N0 gap with no prior RCT
⚠️ OS follow-up likely insufficient: early-stage OSCC events accrue slowly; 47.2mo median too short to detect OS separation
⚠️ single-country trial (India); surgical quality and pathologic staging practice may limit direct generalizability

verdict.rationale: Phase III RCT hitting primary LRFS endpoint; first Level 1 evidence for adjuvant RT in intermediate-risk N0 OSCC, a previously unresolved gray zone.
verdict.audience: pT1-2N0 oral SCC, intermediate-risk features, post-curative surgery

open_questions: Will OS benefit emerge with longer follow-up?
Which intermediate-risk features drive the LRFS benefit?
Reproducible outside India with different surgical volume/staging standards?

bookmarks.text:
#ASCO26 

🗣️ The AREST trial tackles one of the biggest gray zones in oral cavity cancer.

After adequate surgery in pT1-2N0 OSCC with intermediate-risk features:

✅ Adjuvant RT improved loco-regional control
❌ No OS benefit observed

3-year LRFS:
🔹 89.2% vs 80.9%
🔹 HR 0.52… https://t.co/qsALPFX032 pic.twitter.com/F4XzTMETih
